policy: read-only metadata audit; no source repository mutation

material_findings: BackEndNet5 is confirmed by the owner as the ERP backend paired with an Angular frontend. It is required for feature recovery and must be retained.
Sky365Offers is confirmed as the highest-priority strategic project and should receive an early deep audit while remaining an independent canonical repository.
CMGSWindowsServiceSendEmailVwithapikey has a repeatedly failing job that should be disabled operationally, but no source or workflow mutation is permitted under this audit branch policy.
awesome-mcp-servers requires a dedicated provenance, license, permissions, command-execution and credential-handling review before reuse.
The CPDEventPlanner family expanded by three dated repositories in this batch, increasing the risk of choosing a false canonical version by filename alone.
The Net5Wasm family expanded by two additional dated repositories; commit, tree, manifest and branch comparison remains mandatory.
BlazorShop20210830vhome expands the BlazorShop family; the vhome suffix is not proof of canonical or product scope.
